clause_anchor.span: Investor rights under this Agreement continue after a qualified IPO, sale of the Company, or reduction in the holder's ownership unless each affected Major Investor signs a written release.

deviations.original_text: Investor rights under this Agreement terminate upon the earliest of a qualified IPO with gross proceeds of at least $50,000,000, a sale of the Company, or the time the holder no longer holds the minimum share ownership required for the applicable right.
deviations.mutated_text: Investor rights under this Agreement continue after a qualified IPO, sale of the Company, or reduction in the holder's ownership unless each affected Major Investor signs a written release.
deviations.expected_redline_text: Investor rights under this Agreement terminate upon the earliest of a qualified IPO with gross proceeds of at least $50,000,000, a sale of the Company, or the time the holder no longer holds the minimum share ownership required for the applicable right.

clause_anchor.span: Each Major Investor may receive monthly unaudited financial statements within 15 days after month-end and may inspect all Company books, records, source materials, employee communications, and facilities at any time without limitation.

deviations.original_text: Each Major Investor may receive quarterly unaudited financial statements within 45 days after quarter-end and annual audited financial statements within 120 days after fiscal year-end. Inspection access is limited to reasonable requests during normal business hours and remains subject to confidentiality, attorney-client privilege, trade-secret protection, legal compliance, and competitive-sensitivity limits.
deviations.mutated_text: Each Major Investor may receive monthly unaudited financial statements within 15 days after month-end and may inspect all Company books, records, source materials, employee communications, and facilities at any time without limitation.
deviations.expected_redline_text: Each Major Investor may receive quarterly unaudited financial statements within 45 days after quarter-end and annual audited financial statements within 120 days after fiscal year-end. Inspection access is limited to reasonable requests during normal business hours and remains subject to confidentiality, attorney-client privilege, trade-secret protection, legal compliance, and competitive-sensitivity limits.

clause_anchor.span: Each Major Investor has a pro rata right to purchase its share of every security issued by the Company, including securities issued under equity incentive plans, as acquisition consideration, in strategic transactions, in equipment or lease financing, debt with equity features, or in a public offering.

deviations.original_text: Each Major Investor has a pro rata right to purchase its share of new securities issued by the Company, excluding securities issued under equity incentive plans, as acquisition consideration, in strategic transactions, in equipment or lease financing, debt with equity features, or in a public offering.
deviations.mutated_text: Each Major Investor has a pro rata right to purchase its share of every security issued by the Company, including securities issued under equity incentive plans, as acquisition consideration, in strategic transactions, in equipment or lease financing, debt with equity features, or in a public offering.
deviations.expected_redline_text: Each Major Investor has a pro rata right to purchase its share of new securities issued by the Company, excluding securities issued under equity incentive plans, as acquisition consideration, in strategic transactions, in equipment or lease financing, debt with equity features, or in a public offering.

clause_anchor.span: Requisite Holder approval is required before approving annual budgets, hiring vice presidents, entering vendor contracts above $50,000, changing product roadmaps, signing customer arrangements, or administering routine financing matters.

deviations.original_text: No investor approval is required for matters not listed in this Section 4.
deviations.mutated_text: Requisite Holder approval is required before approving annual budgets, hiring vice presidents, entering vendor contracts above $50,000, changing product roadmaps, signing customer arrangements, or administering routine financing matters.
deviations.expected_redline_text: No investor approval is required for matters not listed in this Section 4.

distractors.span: This Agreement is governed by the laws of the State of Delaware, without regard to conflict-of-law rules.
distractors.why_benign: The governing-law canary says Delaware law is acceptable for this engagement.

distractors.span: Any dispute arising under this Agreement will be resolved by confidential arbitration before AAA, except that either party may seek temporary or preliminary injunctive relief in a court of competent jurisdiction.
distractors.why_benign: The dispute-resolution canary says confidential arbitration is acceptable for this engagement.

distractors.span: The Company has issued Common Stock and Series A Preferred Stock, and each holder agrees to exercise rights under this Agreement in good faith.
distractors.why_benign: Describing the capital structure and good-faith exercise of rights does not conflict with the company-side playbook.
